title: Konbini GF / Vegan Guide
disclaimer: Decision support, not a safety guarantee. Scan the ingredient list (原材料名) on every item. Nothing at a konbini is certified gluten-free or vegan — Japanese labels only certify the 8 mandatory allergens, and soy/pork/chicken/fish-dashi/gelatin can be present and unlabeled.

skill.headline: The one move: read the label.
skill.gf_scan: Disqualify if you see: 小麦 / 小麦粉 (wheat), 麦 / 大麦 (barley), 麦芽 (malt), 醤油 (soy sauce).
skill.vegan_scan: Read the FULL 原材料名 for 豚/牛/鶏 (pork/beef/chicken), 魚/かつお/煮干し/だし (fish/bonito/sardine/dashi), 卵 (egg), 乳/バター/チーズ (dairy), ゼラチン (gelatin), はちみつ (honey).
skill.biggest_trap: Hidden katsuo (bonito) fish dashi — not even on the 20-item recommended list, so it can be legally unlabeled. Assume dashi in onigiri fillings, salads, dressings, pickles, and seaweed unless proven otherwise.

phrase.en: I have a wheat allergy. Does this contain wheat?
phrase.ja: 私は小麦アレルギーです。これに小麦は入っていますか？
phrase.rj: Watashi wa komugi arerugī desu. Kore ni komugi wa haitte imasu ka?

shopping_gf.label: 🌾 Celiac / GF konbini meal (scan 小麦/大麦/麦芽/醤油 on each)
items: Plain SALT onigiri (塩むすび) — rice + salt
Plain SALT hard-boiled egg (塩) — brined through the shell; NOT the brown marinated kind (味付け/煮 = soy)
Plain tofu / 冷奴, edamame, natto WITHOUT its tare packet (the packet = wheat/soy)
Cut fruit & cut vegetables — UNdressed (dressings aren't GF; some 'healthy' salads add barley 大麦)
Plain/salt/nori potato chips; plain nuts; dried sweet potato (干し芋); plain yogurt; milk
サラダチキン ONLY if the label shows no 小麦 — brand-dependent (Prima-Ham plain = wheat-free; Seven-Premium plain = HAS wheat flour)
shopping_gf.avoid: Anything with 醤油, oden, all hot-case/fried items, bread & pastry, dressings, imitation crab.

shopping_vegan.label: 🌱 Vegan konbini meal (read full 原材料名; beware unlabeled dashi)
items: Plain SALT onigiri (塩むすび) — the ONLY reliably animal-free onigiri (ume/kombu/natto/inari hide katsuo or niboshi dashi)
Edamame (incl. salted), plain tofu / 冷奴, natto WITHOUT the tare packet
Fresh & cut fruit, plain undressed salads, some pickles (check dashi)
Nuts, dried fruit, salt/nori chips, dried sweet potato (干し芋), senbei (check 醤油), Natural Lawson health-line (e.g. yuzu-salt soybean chips)
Soy milk & plant drinks; dark chocolate (check dairy)
shopping_vegan.avoid: Hidden katsuo dashi; 乳化剤 (emulsifiers, sometimes animal); salad dressings (chicken/fish extract); gelatin, honey, butter/margarine/creaming powder.

seven.name: 7-Eleven
seven.note: Publishes specified-allergen + nutrition info; original (Seven Premium) items carry all 28 allergens labeled, but loose hot-case items may be unlabeled. No certified-GF staples. ⚠ Seven Premium 'plain' salada-chicken contains wheat flour — label-check.

familymart.name: FamilyMart
familymart.note: Allergen hub lists the 8 mandatory allergens; reference-only, directs you to the on-pack label + in-store POP. e.g. kombu onigiri = wheat/sesame/soy; cod-roe-mayo = wheat/egg/soy/gelatin.

lawson.name: Lawson
lawson.note: Strongest published data — declares 28 substances (8 mandatory + 20 recommended incl. soy/gelatin/pork/chicken), so it's the most useful for vegans. Natural Lawson (ナチュラルローソン) health line has more plant-forward options.

common: All three publish allergen data online as a REFERENCE ONLY (cross-contamination disclaimed) and have NO allergen-filter search — on-pack label reading stays authoritative.
